- Closes # (to automatically close the task after the merge)
- Fixes # (for a fixed bug - also closes automatically)
- Resolves # (for resolved issues - closes automatically)
- Refs # (only reference/link to the topic, NO closing)
-->

## Pre-merge checklist
- [ ] The Pull Request title is clear, understandable, and consistent with project conventions (e.g., feat/fix)
- [ ] The code complies with project standards and is formatted correctly
- [ ] Documentation has been written for the code (if required)
- [ ] Unit/integration tests have been written for the code (if required)
- [ ] All test are passing
- [ ] The commit history is clean and understandable
- [ ] The documentation/README has been updated (if required)
